channel.title: Change Management on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Change Management on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1202): Operational Procedures
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Operational Procedures" , "Documentation" , "Change Management" , "Backups" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Professionalism" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master operational procedures for the CompTIA A+ 220-1202 Core 2 exam. Learn documentation, change management, backups, safety, environmental controls, communication, scripting, and AI basics.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Risk Management
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Risk Management" , "ISA/IEC 62443" , "NERC CIP" , "Risk Assessment" , "Governance" , "Supply Chain Risk" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT risk management for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn risk fundamentals, frameworks like ISA/IEC 62443 and NERC CIP, qualitative and quantitative assessments, risk treatments, governance artifacts, third-party risk, and change management.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): General Security Concepts
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Fundamentals" , "Cryptography" , "PKI" , "Zero Trust" , "Access Control" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Security Controls" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master general security concepts for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn security controls, the CIA triad, change management, cryptography, PKI, and Zero Trust.

item.title: Enhancing Cyber Security Resilience: Change Management in an Evolving Landscape
item.category: "Cyber Security" , "Change Management" , "Resilience" , "IT Infrastructure" , "Risk Assessment" , "Compliance" , "Incident Response" , "Best Practices" , "ITIL" , "Security Controls"
item.description: Discover the importance of change management in cyber security and learn how to enhance resilience in today's evolving threat landscape.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Plans, Procedures, and Policies - Maintaining Stability and Security in Network Operations
item.category: "Network Operations" , "IT Management" , "Network Security" , "Change Management" , "Incident Response" , "Disaster Recovery" , "Business Continuity" , "System Life Cycle" , "Standard Operating Procedures" , "Network Management"
item.description: Explore the importance of plans, procedures, and policies in network operations, including change management, incident response, and business continuity.
